TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == badahung == ŚĪčť†ā siwkay nu badahung u misaluma' sa, sibadahung tu. u papatuzu'an sa sapiading tu nanum. u kakuniza nu badahung sa, izaw ku masazayay izaw ku matikenihay. anu yadah ku udad, mangasiw tu matikenih. u Sakizaya a luma' sa, kya badahung sa, sangaen nu eli. badahung badahung ŚĪčť†ā / i badahung ku lesa' nu udad. badahungen badahungen ŚéĽŤďčŚĪčť†ā / badahungen nu tau ku luma' aku! mabadahung mabadahung Ś∑≤ŤďčŚĪčť†ā / mabadahung tu uli' ku luma' ni Payu. mibadahung mibadahung ŤďčŚĪčť†ā / maaedaedap ku babalaki mibadahung tu luma'. pibadahungi pibadahungi ŚéĽŤďčŚĪčť†ā / pibadahungi tu luma' isu tadu amulesa'! sibadahung sibadahung śúČŚĪčť†ā / sibadahung amin kita u tademaw tu luma'. sibadahungay sibadahungay śúČŚĪčť†āÁöĄ / sibadahungay tu sumanahay kiya patikedan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika A roof is part of a building envelope. It is the covering on the uppermost part of a building or shelter which provides protection from animals and weather, notably rain or snow, but also heat, wind and sunlight. The word also denotes the framing or structure which supports that covering.
S.PHON: == badańßuŇč == ** siwkaj nu badańßuŇč u misar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, sibadańßuŇč tu. u papatuzu Ē~ °an sa sapiadiŇč tu nanum. u kakuniza nu badańßuŇč sa, izaw ku masazajaj izaw ku matik…ônińßaj. anu jadańß ku udad, maŇčasiw tu matik…ônińß. u sakizaja a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, kja badańßuŇč sa, saŇča…ôn nu …ôr~…ĺi. badańßuŇč badańßuŇč ** / i badańßuŇč ku r~…ĺ…ôsa Ē~ ° nu udad. badańßuŇč…ôn badańßuŇč…ôn **** / badańßuŇč…ôn nu tau ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° aku! mabadańßuŇč mabadańßuŇč **** / mabadańßuŇč tu ur~…ĺi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni paju. mibadańßuŇč mibadańßuŇč *** / maa…ôda…ôdap ku babar~…ĺaki mibadańßuŇč tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. pibadańßuŇči pibadańßuŇči **** / pibadańßuŇči tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° isu tadu amur~…ĺ…ôsa Ē~ °! sibadańßuŇč sibadańßuŇč *** / sibadańßuŇč amin kita u tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. sibadańßuŇčaj sibadańßuŇčaj **** / sibadańßuŇčaj tu sumanańßaj kija patik…ôdan. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika a roof is part of a buir~…ĺdiŇč …ôn*…ôr~…ĺop…ô. it is tńß…ô ¶o*…ôriŇč on tńß…ô upp…ôrmost part of a buir~…ĺdiŇč or sńß…ôr~…ĺt…ôr wńßi ¶ńß pro*id…ôs prot…ô ¶tion from animar~…ĺs and w…ôatńß…ôr, notabr~…ĺj rain or snow, but ar~…ĺso ńß…ôat, wind and sunr~…ĺigńßt. tńß…ô word ar~…ĺso d…ônot…ôs tńß…ô framiŇč or stru ¶tur…ô wńßi ¶ńß supports tńßat ¶o*…ôriŇč.
S.FORM: == badahung == ŚĪčť†ā siwkay nu badahung u misaluma' sa, sibadahung tu. u papatuzu'an sa sapiading tu nanum. u kakuniza nu badahung sa, izaw ku masazayay izaw ku matikenihay. anu yadah ku udad, mangasiw tu matikenih. u Sakizaya a luma' sa, kya badahung sa, sangaen nu eli. badahung badahung ŚĪčť†ā / i badahung ku lesa' nu udad. badahungen badahungen ŚéĽŤďčŚĪčť†ā / badahungen nu tau ku luma' aku! mabadahung mabadahung Ś∑≤ŤďčŚĪčť†ā / mabadahung tu uli' ku luma' ni Payu. mibadahung mibadahung ŤďčŚĪčť†ā / maaedaedap ku babalaki mibadahung tu luma'. pibadahungi pibadahungi ŚéĽŤďčŚĪčť†ā / pibadahungi tu luma' isu tadu amulesa'! sibadahung sibadahung śúČŚĪčť†ā / sibadahung amin kita u tademaw tu luma'. sibadahungay sibadahungay śúČŚĪčť†āÁöĄ / sibadahungay tu sumanahay kiya patikedan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika A roof is part of a building envelope. It is the covering on the uppermost part of a building or shelter which provides protection from animals and weather, notably rain or snow, but also heat, wind and sunlight. The word also denotes the framing or structure which supports that covering.
S.PHON: == badańßuŇč == ** siwkaj nu badańßuŇč u misar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, sibadańßuŇč tu. u papatuzu Ē~ °an sa sapiadiŇč tu nanum. u kakuniza nu badańßuŇč sa, izaw ku masazajaj izaw ku matik…ônińßaj. anu jadańß ku udad, maŇčasiw tu matik…ônińß. u sakizaja a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, kja badańßuŇč sa, saŇča…ôn nu …ôr~…ĺi. badańßuŇč badańßuŇč ** / i badańßuŇč ku r~…ĺ…ôsa Ē~ ° nu udad. badańßuŇč…ôn badańßuŇč…ôn **** / badańßuŇč…ôn nu tau ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° aku! mabadańßuŇč mabadańßuŇč **** / mabadańßuŇč tu ur~…ĺi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni paju. mibadańßuŇč mibadańßuŇč *** / maa…ôda…ôdap ku babar~…ĺaki mibadańßuŇč tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. pibadańßuŇči pibadańßuŇči **** / pibadańßuŇči tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° isu tadu amur~…ĺ…ôsa Ē~ °! sibadańßuŇč sibadańßuŇč *** / sibadańßuŇč amin kita u tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. sibadańßuŇčaj sibadańßuŇčaj **** / sibadańßuŇčaj tu sumanańßaj kija patik…ôdan. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika a roof is part of a buir~…ĺdiŇč …ôn*…ôr~…ĺop…ô. it is tńß…ô ¶o*…ôriŇč on tńß…ô upp…ôrmost part of a buir~…ĺdiŇč or sńß…ôr~…ĺt…ôr wńßi ¶ńß pro*id…ôs prot…ô ¶tion from animar~…ĺs and w…ôatńß…ôr, notabr~…ĺj rain or snow, but ar~…ĺso ńß…ôat, wind and sunr~…ĺigńßt. tńß…ô word ar~…ĺso d…ônot…ôs tńß…ô framiŇč or stru ¶tur…ô wńßi ¶ńß supports tńßat ¶o*…ôriŇč.
